LSE-HS12-L4-13001400-HSSCIENG1112-DPC-LAT-01 • HS Engineering Design 11-12 • Modeling Systems

The Mural Current

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a teacher and a girl. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What was the teacher's lesson about?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Build a full justification: make a claim about why the teacher describes the posters that way, explain the reasoning he gives, and state the conclusion about what the posters were really doing.
